title: The better AI gets, the smaller its share of the economy might get – Alex Imas and Phil Trammell
summary: An economics podcast episode discussing how AI's productivity gains may change the economy's capital versus labor share, optimal taxation and redistribution mechanisms, and how developing nations can benefit from AGI. The title argues that superior AI capabilities could paradoxically reduce AI's economic share while creating broader wealth questions.
